creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sounds like a good idea. We (I) could create a github repo for the pw_dict files. The hard part is dreaming up a name for it. cracklib-freebsd-port-pregen or cracklib-freebsd-port-pw_dict (or other permutations of the same) come to mind. I'm open to better names though.

Getting back to the reason for a github or other repo (sourceforge?) is to distribute maintenance of the pw_dict files, especially for succession planning, due diligence.

Thoughs?
